channel.title: Vasili Kiselev
channel.description: New animations, stills, projects and other.

item.title: Vote for Ryaba the Hen
item.description: Watch 'Ryaba the Hen' @Funny Cat Animation Festival on-line (limited time only) and vote for Ryaba and other animations.

item.title: Ryaba the Hen @Sardinia Queer SFF
item.description: If you happen to be in Cagliari on 19 November, don't miss Ryaba the Hen competing in Sardinia Queer SFF.
